title: Claw Result
description: Records the execution outcome of a job run. Starts sparse (status: pending) and is updated in-place as the run progresses through its lifecycle.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the result file was first created.

agent.description: Agent key that executed (or will execute) this run.

command.description: Display form of the agent command (without actual prompt text).

summary.description: Trimmed stdout/stderr summary from the agent run.

validation.description: Artifact validation snapshot recorded after report/result files are written.

hook.description: Hook delivery snapshot after run completion.

delivery.description: Machine-verifiable completion delivery contract derived from hook state.
